Class Animal

java.lang.Object
Animal
public class Animal extends Object
This class represents one individual animal in the safari simulation. It stores the identity, species, alive status, and spotted status of the animal.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Animal()
    Default constructor initializes an Animal object with default values.
    Animal(int identity, Species species, boolean alive, boolean spotted)
    Parameterized constructor initializes an Animal object with given values.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getIdentity()
    Accessor method returns the identity of the animal.
    Species
    getSpecies()
    Accessor method returns the Species object of the animal.
    boolean
    getSpotted()
    Returns whether the animal has been spotted.
    boolean
    isAlive()
    Accessor method returns whether the animal is alive.
    void
    killAnimal()
    Marks the animal as dead by setting alive status to false.

    Mutator method sets the alive status of the animal.

    Mutator method sets the identity of the animal.
    void
    setSpecies(Species species)
    Mutator method sets the Species object of an animal.
    void
    setSpotted(boolean spotted)
    Sets the spotted status of the animal.
    String
    toString()
    Returns the animal details as a String.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Animal

      public Animal()
      Default constructor initializes an Animal object with default values.

    • Animal

      public Animal(int identity, Species species, boolean alive, boolean spotted)
      Parameterized constructor initializes an Animal object with given values.
      Parameters:
      identity - the unique three-digit identity of the animal
      species - the Species object containing details of the animal
      alive - true if the animal is alive, else false
      spotted - true if the animal spotted, else false

  • Method Details

    • getIdentity

      public int getIdentity()
      Accessor method returns the identity of the animal.
      Returns:
      the identity of the animal

    • getSpecies

      public Species getSpecies()
      Accessor method returns the Species object of the animal.
      Returns:
      the species of the animal

    • getSpotted

      public boolean getSpotted()
      Returns whether the animal has been spotted.
      Returns:
      true if the animal has been spotted, otherwise false

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Accessor method returns whether the animal is alive.
      Returns:
      true if the animal is alive, else false

    • killAnimal

      public void killAnimal()
      Marks the animal as dead by setting alive status to false. It'll be used when an animal is killed during the safari simulation.

    • setAlive

      public void setAlive(boolean alive)
      Mutator method sets the alive status of the animal.
      Parameters:
      alive - true if the animal is alive, else false

    • setIdentity

      public void setIdentity(int identity)
      Mutator method sets the identity of the animal. If an invalid identity is entered, the identity is set to 0.
      Parameters:
      identity - the unique 3 digit identity of the animal

    • setSpecies

      public void setSpecies(Species species)
      Mutator method sets the Species object of an animal. If the Species object is null, a default Species object is created.
      Parameters:
      species - the Species object of the animal

    • setSpotted

      public void setSpotted(boolean spotted)
      Sets the spotted status of the animal.
      Parameters:
      spotted - true if the animal has been spotted, otherwise false

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the animal details as a String.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a String containing the animal's identity, alive status, and species details
